de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class SourceVisitorExtended

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.SourceVisitor
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.SourceVisitorExtended
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    RecoderModelTransformer.FinalOuterVarsCollector, RecoderModelTransformer.TypeAndClassDeclarationCollector

    public class SourceVisitorExtended
extends SourceVisitor
    Adds visitor methods for recoder extensions.
